headline: Lennox Increases Quarterly Dividend
summary: The board of directors at Lennox (NYSE: LII), a leader in energy-efficient building and home comfort solutions, approved an increase in the quarterly dividend from $1.30 to $1.36 per share of common stock, payable July 15, 2026, to stockholders of record as of June 30, 2026.

headline: 2 Reasons to Like LII and 1 to Stay Skeptical
summary: Lennox has followed the market’s trajectory closely, rising in tandem with the S&P 500 over the past six months. The stock has climbed by 12.3% to $501.49 per share while the index has gained 11.6%.
